title: REVIEW REQUIRED: replace with a project source title

source.section: REVIEW REQUIRED: optional section, heading, or anchor

owner: REVIEW REQUIRED: assign a project owner
purpose: REVIEW REQUIRED: explain why this source should guide agents or maintainers
reviewCadence: REVIEW REQUIRED: set cadence, trigger, or release checkpoint

claims.claim: REVIEW REQUIRED: summarize the source-backed claim
claims.evidence: REVIEW REQUIRED: cite the exact source section or artifact
claims.limitations: REVIEW REQUIRED: record stale, partial, or unverified assumptions

retireWhen: REVIEW REQUIRED: state when this source record should be retired or replaced
notes: Project-owned source records are separate from any product-level public source ledger.
